Brief description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? How does it align with the project's visual and engineering goals?

Describe the approach. Reference relevant docs (`docs/visual-guidelines.md`, `docs/architecture.md`).

## Alternatives Considered

Other options you evaluated.

## Impact

- [ ] Visual identity unchanged
- [ ] Documentation update required
- [ ] Validation / tests update required
